ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industrial sector */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of energy consumption */,
  "heating" REAL /* Heating energy consumption (in %) */,
  "cooling" REAL /* Cooling energy consumption (in %) */,
  "envelope" REAL /* Envelope energy consumption (in %) */,
  "lighting" REAL /* Lighting energy consumption (in %) */,
  "appliances" REAL /* Appliances energy consumption (in %) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the facility where the energy consumption is recorded */,
  "geographical_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the facility (e.g., city, country) */,
  "total_energy_consumption" REAL /* Total energy consumption for the year */,
  "renewable_energy_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of energy consumption from renewable sources */,
  "non_renewable_energy_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of energy consumption from non-renewable sources */,
  "energy_intensity" REAL /* Energy intensity (energy consumption per unit of output, e.g., kWh per ton of production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES industrial_sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industrial_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industrial sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the industrial sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industrial sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical sector organization) */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of sector (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  "sector_size" TEXT /* Size of the sector (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private, survey) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the data source */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_energy_efficiency" (
  "sector_energy_efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector energy efficiency record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industrial sector */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of energy efficiency data */,
  "energy_efficiency" REAL /* Energy efficiency (in %) */,
  "target_efficiency" REAL /* Target energy efficiency for the sector */,
  "actual_efficiency" REAL /* Actual energy efficiency achieved */,
  "efficiency_improvement" REAL /* Percentage improvement in energy efficiency compared to the previous year */,
  "efficiency_trend" TEXT /* Trend in energy efficiency (e.g., improving, declining, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_energy_efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_energy_efficiency_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_energy_efficiency_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES industrial_sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_isic" (
  "industry_isic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry ISIC record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industrial sector */,
  "isic_code" TEXT /* ISIC code for the industrial sector */,
  "isic_description" TEXT /* Description of the ISIC code */,
  "isic_version" TEXT /* Version of the ISIC code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_isic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_isic_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES industrial_sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_isic_values" (
  "industry_isic_values_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry ISIC value record */,
  "industry_isic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry ISIC record */,
  "value" REAL /* Value for the ISIC code */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., percentage, absolute value) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the value (e.g., kWh, tons) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_isic_values_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_isic_values_industry_isic_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_isic_id") REFERENCES industry_isic ("industry_isic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
